prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科组最低位次分别为约7316→5796→7516→5095→10086名，整体呈\"降-升-降-大幅后移\"的剧烈波动格局。2024年曾冲高至5095名（近年最佳），但 2025年骤降至10086名，单年后移近5000名，波动幅度极大，反映出该校在甘肃理科考生中的报考热度不稳定；该校在甘肃理科组招生计划：2021年48人、2022 年48人、2023年49人、2024年45人、2025年52人，2026年大幅扩招至104人，较2025年增长100%。如此大幅度的扩招将显著降低录取门槛，使最低位次数字明显增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（南湖校区监测到不明巨型生物活动），可能对考生报考心理产生一定负面影响；抖音热度排名 第98位（一般），短视频曝光量偏低；材料科学与工程（A）、交通运输工程（A-）、机械工程（A-）为该校王牌学科，与招生专业中的材料类、交通运输类、 机械类等高度对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力；武汉理工大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第54名，近年排名在48-55之间波动，属于中上游211院校，在材料、交通、机械等领域具有 行业影响力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类等专业社会热度持续偏高；甘肃2026年考生总数约218700人，按近年比例估算 物理类约147600人，较2025年增长约21.5%，竞争加剧；武汉理工大学位于湖北武汉，属中部地区 ，对甘肃考生而言属于跨省就读。该校在甘肃招生占比不高（2025年理科52人占全国计划比例较小），无显著地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的波动趋 势、2026年招生计划翻倍扩招（100%）这一最强影响因素，以及甘肃物理类考生增加约21.5%带来的竞争加剧，扩招效应远大于考生增加效应，预计2026年最低位次将较2025年进 一步后移。预测最低位次约16338名，区间15838-16838名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were approximately 7316 → 5796 → 7516 → 5095 → 10086, showing a volatile pattern of "down-up-down-sharp drop." In 2024, it surged to 5095 (best in recent years), but in 2025, it plummeted to 10086, dropping nearly 5000 positions in a single year, indicating unstable application enthusiasm among Gansu science students. The enrollment plan for the science group in Gansu: 48 in 2021, 48 in 2022, 49 in 2023, 45 in 2024, 52 in 2025, and a significant expansion to 104 in 2026, a 100% increase from 2025. Such a large expansion will significantly lower the admission threshold, causing the minimum ranking to increase notably.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (unidentified giant biological activity detected at Nanhu Campus), which may negatively impact candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 98th (average), with low short video exposure. Materials Science and Engineering (A), Transportation Engineering (A-), and Mechanical Engineering (A-) are the university's flagship disciplines, closely matching majors such as Materials, Transportation, and Mechanics, attracting students interested in these fields. Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 54th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, fluctuating between 48-55 in recent years, making it a mid-to-upper tier 211 institution with industry influence in materials, transportation, and mechanics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gansu examinees is about 218,700, with an estimated 147,600 in the Physics Category based on recent proportions, an increase of about 21.5% from 2025, intensifying competition. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, meaning cross-province study for Gansu students. The university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is low (52 science students in 2025, a small share of the national plan), with no significant regional preference signal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the sharp drop in rankings in 2025, the doubling of the enrollment plan in 2026 (100% increase) as the strongest factor, and the increased competition from a 21.5% rise in Gansu Physics Category examinees, the expansion effect far outweighs the examinee increase effect. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will further drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16,338, with a range of 15,838 to 16,838.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Wuhan University of Technology significantly expands enrollment in Gansu science to 104 students, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 16,338, range 15,838-16,838. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 15,800), prioritize Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Class and Electronic Information Class. For rankings in the middle of the range (about 16,000-16,500), choose Tier 2 advantageous majors such as Materials Class (A discipline) and Mechanical Class. For rankings near the upper bound (after 16,800), consider Tier 3 majors like Civil Class and Environmental Class as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group were approximately 2162 → 1628 → 1596 → 1904 → 2374, showing an overall trend of "advance-advance-retreat-retreat". It surged to around 1600 in 2022-2023, but retreated consecutively in 2024-2025, dropping to 2374 in 2025, with a cumulative retreat of about 778 in the past two years, indicating a significant decline in application popularity; the university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Gansu: 11 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 14 in 2024, 13 in 2025, and increasing to 15 in 2026, a growth of about 15.4% compared to 2025, a slight expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 54th in the Soft Science Ranking, known for engineering, with a small scale of liberal arts majors, offering only 5-6 majors in Gansu for liberal arts; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 98th (average), with limited appeal to liberal arts candidates; the university's liberal arts-related disciplines have no A- or above ratings, and liberal arts majors (Law, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Foreign Languages and Literature, Economics) are not the university's strong areas.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended but clearly differentiated; Teacher Training/Education is heating up; the estimated number of history category candidates in Gansu for 2026 is about 71,000, an increase of about 21.8% compared to 58,374 in 2025, intensifying competition; Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, which is an inter-provincial choice for Gansu liberal arts candidates. The university has a small number of liberal arts admissions in Gansu (only 13 in 2025), with no significant regional preference signal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of consecutive ranking retreats in the past two years, the slight expansion of the enrollment plan in 2026 (15.4%), and the intensified competition due to an increase of about 21.8% in Gansu history category candidates, the candidate growth slightly exceeds the expansion rate. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly advance compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is about 2563, with a range of 2102-3024.
